message.content: {"analysis":"Autotune at 52.1% with 2 trials. Best validation score is only 0.6022, below 0.62 target. The autotuneModelSize='100M' constraint may be too restrictive. Need to let it run and see if it improves. If it doesn't reach 0.62, I'll need to try a different approach - perhaps use autotune without size constraint and then quantize aggressively afterward, or manually train with known good hyperparameters.","plan":"Let autotune finish. If accuracy is still below 0.62, try: 1) Remove model size constraint from autotune (let it find best accuracy), 2) Train on full data with those params, 3) Quantize aggressively to get under 150MB.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"","duration":60.0}]}
